hints.text: Plates **black w/ white text** (military plates have a small Tunisian flag on the left)
A **follow car** escorts the Google car in most coverage (can be ahead or far behind — pan & zoom to find it)
Google car is **black with a medium-length thin antenna**
**Olive-tree plantations** in neat rows on raked, weedless soil; road lines white (outer dashed or solid)
**French + Arabic** common — often bilingual signs; distinctive Latin font
Direction signs white bg, towns in Arabic + Latin (Tunis often listed even far away)
Traditional **blue** doors/windows/gates (esp. on Djerba); red-and-white striped curbs (also Israel/Palestine)
White concrete **markers w/ a rounded red/yellow/green top** (distances + road number → pinpoint)
Fairly unique **stop sign** with Arabic + Latin (Jordan/UAE similar; Israel/Palestine use a hand)

Coverage mostly **east coast** (Bizerte→Medenine); **follow-car type = region** (light-green Toyota north, dark-green Mazda Hammamet→Djerba, Kairouan white Mitsubishi, **Djerba = no follow car**); N Mediterranean/hilly, centre flat/arid, S desert
